steps.t: Kibilzahar lies to the north-west of Kuru-leiri. Nicca told you that some evil power has trapped fell spirits within the bodies of wights in Kibilzaha…
Arre is at Kuru-leiri, south-east of Kibilzahar. Having defeated Delucheleg, the Gaunt-man responsible for raising the wights, you should return to Ar…
